desc: DONE: selected direct raw m1n1 for B0. The byte stream is exact 16-KiB-aligned m1n1.bin prefix, chosen.bootargs, gzip/XZ kernel, raw FDT, gzip/XZ initramfs, and >=4 zero bytes; raw entry is 0x800 and no outer container/Mach-O/SPTM path is used. Added strict host verifier with exact-member/hash, order/count, compression integrity, truncation/tail, entry/alignment, 64-MiB object policy, and expansion/runtime budgets; built and parsed a 21,728,804-byte in-memory fixture. Current local m1n1 has unapproved PCIe work and is explicitly not a B0 input. Result: done/2026-07-23-t6040-raw-boot-object-layout.md; verifier: scripts/t6040-raw-object-verify.py. No APFS, Boot Policy, enrollment, or rig access occurred.
author: codex
